subject: FW: Question for Jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: David Grosof [mailto:grosof@sloan.mit.edu] 
Sent: Thursday, February 07, 2008 4:11 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Question for Jeffrey

Hi, Lesley,

  Here's a question for Jeffrey:
  I'm curious to know whether you're exploring Mandelbrot's ideas about
financial markets. If not, I'd love to know what of his work is most
interesting to you.

  Also, there's been quite a buzz about Duncan Watts' work on social
networks, the tipping point, degrees of separation, nets on the web vs.
off the web: you might enjoy a reading of
http://www.fastcompany.com/magazine/122/is-the-tipping-point-toast_Print
er_Friendly.html

Regards,
David
(510) 545-4068 (office # that bounces to my mobile when I'm not at my
desk)

Hi, Lesley,

Also, there's been quite a buzz about Duncan Watts' work on social
